app.resetConfirm: Are you sure? All data will be deleted. This cannot be undone.
editMode.title: You're in edit mode
editMode.scheduleExplain: You opened this from the home screen. Place or adjust courses on the grid. «Save» stores your changes and returns home; «Cancel» exits without saving.
editMode.rulesExplain: You're updating attendance rules for each course. «Save» applies changes and returns home; «Cancel» keeps your previous rules.
editMode.semesterExplain: You're updating the semester start and end dates. «Save» applies them; «Cancel» discards changes.
schedule.title: Weekly schedule
schedule.lead: Tap an empty cell to enter a course name, or use «Add another course». When placing hours, use «Done»; then «Continue to attendance rules» to proceed.
schedule.addCourseIntro: Type a new course name or pick an existing one to add more hours.
schedule.placingBanner: "{name}" is being placed - tap cells. Tap again to remove from that slot. Press Done when finished.
schedule.donePlacingInBar: «Done» is also on the bottom bar — finish placing from there.
schedule.needAddFirst: First add a course, then tap cells.
schedule.confirmRemoveCell: Do you want to remove this slot?
schedule.devamBlockedHint: Continue is disabled while placing; press Done first.
schedule.semesterRangeHint: Academic period (chosen in the previous step): {start} → {end}
schedule.editPlacementBanner: Editing «{name}»: tap empty cells to add hours; tap that course's cell again to clear that slot.
rules.title: Attendance rules
rules.lead: Is there an attendance limit for this course?
dashboard.title: ATTTENDorDANCE
dashboard.longPressHint: Press and hold a card or calendar slot for the full picker (cancel, attended, unsure, …).
settings.title: Settings
settings.tapModeHint: Today and week cycle: attended -> missed -> no selection. Month cycle: attended -> missed -> unsure -> no selection.
settings.tapModeLongPressHint: Press and hold to open the full status dialog (cancel, attended, unsure).
settings.notifLead: Reminders before class and a tap-to-check-in panel (browser permission required).
settings.notifDenied: Notification permission was denied. You can allow it in browser or system settings.
settings.backupMissing: No automatic backup found to restore.
status.offline: No internet connection. Core flow continues offline.
status.offlineHint: Sync/update actions resume automatically when connection returns.
status.permissionDenied: Notification permission is disabled. Re-enable it from Settings.
update.ready: A new version is ready. Reload to update.
update.item1: Settings center expanded: theme, language, notifications and data actions are in one place.
update.item2: Automatic local backup and last-backup timestamp added.
update.item3: Clear guidance banners added for offline, denied permission and update-ready states.
onboard.pastLead: You can mark them on the calendar, or skip and do it later.
onboard.pastLaterHint: You can do this later from Settings or Month view.
onboard.pastEntryHint: Multiple hours on the same day appear as separate chips. Default counts as attended: 1) absent 2) unsure 3) back to default (attended). Then «Next course».
onboard.pastPickMonthLead: Months follow the semester range you picked first; only months up to today are listed (most recent on top). Future months are hidden.
onboard.pastMonthNavHint: Use the arrows or keyboard ← → to move between months.
onboard.pastLongPressHint: Press and hold a class slot for every option, including cancelled.
onboard.pastBulkExplain: Stored as unknown-date absences; they count toward your limit.
lang.pickLead: Select app language. You can change it later in Settings.
tutorial.title: Quick start guide
tutorial.lead: A short flow to get started:
tutorial.step1: Use Today to mark attendance with a single tap.
tutorial.step2: Use Week/Month views to review past classes in bulk.
tutorial.step3: Open Report to track risky courses and remaining allowance.
tutorial.step4: Adjust notifications, language, and theme from Settings.
notif.preBody: Class is coming up. Tap to mark attendance.
notif.followBody: Tap to mark attendance for this class too.
notif.wrapupBody: Tap to choose which classes you attended today.
notif.wrapupPanelTitle: Which classes did you attend today?
notif.wrapupPanelLead: Single tap: Attended (green). Double tap: Missed (red). If untouched, Save marks it as missed.
extra.title: Add extra lesson
extra.recurringYes: Yes, every week same day and time
extra.attendance: Track attendance for this extra lesson
extra.newRulesHint: No rule exists for this course name yet. Enter limit settings.
extra.existingRules: Existing attendance rules will be used for this name.
absence.quickLead: Optionally select the date. You can also mark it as uncertain.
absence.confirm.ratioRisk: You are close to your absence limit. Add anyway?
absence.confirm.unknownRisk: There are multiple uncertain records and a risk near limit. Continue?
absence.confirm.exceedMax: This will exceed the configured absence limit. Continue?
absence.riskBanner: Some courses are in risk zone or have too many uncertain records. Check details.
absence.exhaustedBanner: You may have already failed one or more courses due to exhausted absence allowance.
absence.lowRemainingIntro: You are close to your absence limit — be careful.
absence.lowRemainingLine: "{course}": Only {n} more counted absence(s) before you hit the limit.
absence.calendarNoTrackable: No attendance-tracked course found for this class name.
absence.futureNotAllowed: You can't enter attendance for a future date.
absence.futureAttendanceExplain: This day hasn't happened yet, so you can't add present, absent, or cancelled records. You can only record for today and past days.
absence.futureDayColumnHint: Future day — attendance can't be entered here. When the day arrives, use Today or a past date.
report.title: Attendance report
report.detail.projectionWarn: At this pace you may exceed the absence limit by semester end!
holiday.banner: Today is a public holiday: {name}. Mark classes as cancelled?
semester.title: Academic calendar
semester.lead: Pick semester start and end first; then you’ll place courses on the weekly grid. This range drives reports and which months appear when entering past absences.
semester.invalidRange: Start date cannot be after end date — fix it in the calendar.
semester.presetHint: Pick a template or set dates below. University-specific options can be added here later.
semester.preset.custom: Manual — I’ll pick in the calendar
semester.datePickTip: You don’t have to type dates — tap the field or use Calendar.
